Metadata-only behavior verified: assembler is a pure, deterministic function (assert + frozen object construction, no I/O, no DB/storage/lock/fetch). All runtime/eval/write permission flags are false in policy, module, fixture, and result: runtime_permission_evaluation, permission_engine_execution, authz_evaluator_called, security_trimming_execution, test_runner_execution, runtime_fixture/test_execution, golden_fixture_generation/persistence, golden_catalog_write, unit_test_contract_write, audit_ledger_append, audit_event_write, database/storage/product_state writes, idempotency/lock writes, plus no_real_data=true and writes_product_state=false.

Forbidden-claim enforcement verified: boundaryClaims must be a non-array object; any truthy forbidden claim (e.g., execute_test_golden_view_case, generate_golden_fixture, evaluate_runtime_permission, start_ldip_implementation, use_real/secret data) throws, and any truthy unknown claim throws — fail-closed. failClosedOn covers pack/next_subphase drift, runtime/security/audit/golden-write claims, LDIP, real-data/secret, and unknown_claim.

Cross-artifact consistency verified: contract definition lists, fixture result, policy constants, service module, and validator expectations are mutually aligned (result field set, included subphase ids, unit/micro titles, decision bindings length=6, ref strings scoped to cp00_076). Tests assert policy/module/fixture/contract mirroring and drift/unsafe-claim rejection.

validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs correctly advances the live cursor (currentContractSubphaseId=RP00.P06.M07.S08, currentSourceMicroPhaseId=RP00.P06.M07), registers the 10 new required-closed subphases, and adds the construction-inspection gate requiring control_plane_permission_audit_synthetic_fixture_test_golden_seed_verified===true.

JSON appends to control-plane-contract.json and synthetic-control-plane.json follow the standard append pattern (prior entry closed with comma, trailing brace reused); the fixture-mirrors-policy test JSON-parses the file, providing coverage that structure remains valid.

Informational: result.command_evidence_ref intentionally references the consumed upstream docs/closeout-packs/cp00-075/command-evidence.json (consistent with upstream_evidence_refs/required_evidence_refs and prior-pack convention); not a defect.
